overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character paddling a canoe down a forested river. The journey progresses from rocky rapids through calmer waters, ending near a small waterfall cascade in a mountainous wilderness setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river rapids in forested mountain valley

agents.ego_description: paddling canoe through rocky rapids, steering around boulders in the current

entered.detail: massive gray boulders emerging from the river water and lining the banks
dense pine trees covering the hillside along the riverbank
dense pine trees covering the hillside along the riverbank
churning whitewater current flowing between the rocks
mountain peaks visible in the background under blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a canoe navigating through rocky rapids in a forested mountain valley. Large boulders emerge from the churning water while dense coniferous forests line both riverbanks. The camera follows the character paddling through the turbulent current under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: calm forested river section with grassy banks

events.description: river widens and current slows, transitioning from rocky rapids to calmer waters

agents.ego_description: paddling steadily down the open river between forested banks, maintaining a straight course

entered.detail: green grass-covered banks replacing the rocky shoreline
large fallen log lying on the left bank among the trees

segments.scene_description: The river widens into a calmer section with grassy banks replacing the rocky rapids. The canoe moves steadily through the water as the forested hillsides continue on both sides. A fallen tree trunk is visible on the left bank as the journey continues downstream.

scene_state.functional_zone: river narrows approaching rocky waterfall cascade

events.description: waterfall becomes visible on the right bank as the river channel narrows

agents.ego_description: paddling toward the waterfall, navigating the narrowing river channel with rocky cliffs on the left

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left riverbank with exposed stone
small waterfall cascading down rocks on the right side of the river
jagged rock formation at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The river narrows as the canoe approaches a waterfall cascading down the rocky right bank. The left bank transforms into a steep rocky cliff while the forest canopy continues overhead. The camera follows the canoe as it paddles closer to the waterfall, ending near the rocky outcrop at the cascade's base.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a canoe transitions from turbulent mountain rapids into a serene, wide river stretch. It begins with the vessel navigating churning water and large boulders within a forested valley under the bright midday sun. As the current stabilizes, the rocky terrain gives way to grassy banks and the river widens, smoothing the water's surface. The scene then shifts to a steady downstream glide past forested hillsides, passing a fallen tree trunk on the left bank as the environment opens up.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a river narrows and transforms into a dramatic rocky gorge leading toward a waterfall. It begins with the canoe paddling forward while the river channel tightens, causing the left bank to shift into a steep, towering rocky cliff. As the vessel advances, the dense forest canopy remains overhead, framing the approach toward a cascade of water tumbling down the rocky right bank. The scene then closes as the camera follows the canoe's trajectory, finally arriving at the base of the waterfall beside a rugged rocky outcrop.
